FEDERAL.label: NIH, VA, and other federal agencies

insights: Academic sponsors dominate (70.3%) — industry investment in prosthetics is low relative to other medical fields
Federal funding (NIH/VA) accounts for only 7.1% — the VA is a key prosthetic stakeholder but underfunded
Industry sponsors account for 19.4% — mostly focused on prosthetic joint infections, not limb prosthetics
No manufacturer-led Phase 3 trials for next-generation prosthetic limbs exist in the dataset
